shortDescription: A young family's first forever home — designed to grow with the kids, the dog, and the way life actually moves through a house.
longDescription: A full-service interior design project for a young family in Menifee, blending durable performance fabrics with editorial-grade composition. Cream sectionals, warm plank flooring, marble accents, and intentional negative space create rooms that feel collected, considered, and quietly elevated — without sacrificing the rough-and-tumble realities of daily family life.

title: Menifee Family Home
